data.title: Uber's Strong Q4 Offset By $1.1 Billion Forex Headwind, Currency Devaluation: Ongoing Tariff Wars Drive Weak Q1 Outlook
data.description: Uber Technologies shares plunged after its Q4 earnings thanks to foreign exchange headwinds amid stronger dollar and earnings per share miss.

data.title: Tesla's First Megafactory Outside US To Start Production On Feb 11: Report
data.description: Tesla's Shanghai megafactory will start production on Feb. 11, ramping up in Q1. Revenue from energy segment doubled in Q4.

data.title: Short Seller Jim Chanos Flags DeepSeek-Like Risk As Biggest Threat To Markets In Next 6 Months: '…Comes Out Of Left Field That Changes People's Thinking'
Michael Saylor Eyes 45% Volatility Gap Between Bitcoin And Traditional Markets, Reveals New Strategy To Attract 'Large Pool Of Investors'

data.title: DeepSeek Founder Liang Wenfeng Says China Put Profits Over Innovation — But Now Beijing Must Build A Tech Ecosystem To Rival Nvidia
data.description: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng emphasized that China must transition from prioritizing short-term profits to fostering a strong AI ecosystem, similar to how Nvidia thrived with industry and community support, to sustain long-term innovation and global competitiveness.
